_fixture_meta.description: Value persona adds WBA citing a specific medium-term FCF recovery thesis — new hypothesis with forward-looking rationale, not price momentum.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; WBA turnaround thesis is public; sanitised

thesis_status.reason: Initiating a medium-term recovery thesis: WBA is trading at 0.4x book and 3.5x forward FCF after a 70% drawdown that priced in a going-concern scenario. The new CEO's pharmacy-closure plan removes $500M of annualised cash drain by Q4; insurance reimbursement rate headwinds are already reflected in sell-side consensus. The thesis is: balance-sheet stabilisation (funded through the Shields Health stake sale) + pharmacy rationalisation restores FCF to $600M–$800M within 18–24 months, at which point the stock re-rates from distressed to recovery multiple.
